concerns.text: T010, T011 marked [P] and placed BEFORE implementation tasks (T012-T019). Tests cannot be parallel-safe before implementation artifacts exist. Tests should be written to fail initially, but [P] tag implies they can run independently of implementation completion.

Document claims 'User stories can then proceed in parallel' but data-flow dependencies (US1→US2→US3) make parallel execution impossible. US2 requires US1 cleaned data; US3 requires US2 computed descriptors. This contradicts the data-flow dependency model.
T020, T021 marked [P] before T022 implementation. Same issue as US1 - tests cannot be parallel-safe before the code they test exists.
T028, T029 marked [P] before T030 implementation. Same issue - tests depend on implementation artifacts.
T017 (exponential backoff) should be integrated into T012 (fetch_structures.py), not a separate task. T018, T019 should be part of T014 (clean_merge.py) validation logic.
T032 (causal-language check) belongs in utils/validation.py per plan.md, not in regression.py. T034 is documentation, not implementation - should be separate from regression tasks.
